---
title: "Endoscopic and videofluoroscopic evaluations of swallowing for dysphagia: A systematic review"
date: 2025-07-01
author:
  - name: Ferrari De Castro, Mario Augusto
  - name: Dedivitis, Rogério Aparecido
  - name: Luongo De Matos, Leandro
  - name: Baraúna, José Carlos
  - name: Kowalski, Luiz Paulo
  - name: De Carvalho Moura, Kauê
  - name: Herman Partezani, Daniel
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Brazilian Journal of Otorhinolaryngology"
  volume: 91
  doi: "10.1016/j.bjorl.2025.101598"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Endoscopic and videofluoroscopic evaluations of swallowing for dysphagia: A systematic review</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
